title: Noida workers protest: Supreme Court refuses relief to accused DU student, asks her to move HC
description: The Supreme Court on Friday declined to entertain a plea by a Delhi University (DU) student challenging her arrest on allegations that she incited violence during an industrial workers’ protest in Noida on April 13 [Akriti Chaudhary v State of Uttar Pradesh].A Bench of Justices BV Nagarathna and Ujjal Bhuyan told her to move the Allahabad High Court first for relief. “Petitioner should avail appropriate remedies before the appropriate forum. Everyone comes here... There are 93,000 cases pending
